title: history.rs uses from_utf8_lossy: silently corrupts MLS ciphertext in Phase 2
description: history.rs append_received() calls String::from_utf8_lossy(payload) and stores the result as TEXT in SQLite. MLS ciphertexts are arbitrary bytes; from_utf8_lossy replaces invalid UTF-8 sequences with U+FFFD, permanently destroying data. Triggered the moment Phase 2 sends any MLS-encrypted message — which is all messages. Bad behavior: scrollback history is silently garbled for all messages once MLS is active. Schema must change from TEXT to BLOB before Phase 2 lands or history is unusable.
close_reason: Changed history.rs payload column from TEXT to BLOB; removed from_utf8_lossy from storage path; updated HistoryEntry.payload to Vec<u8>; display callers use String::from_utf8_lossy for rendering; added binary_payload_roundtrip regression test.
